coverage.note: This story regenerates goldens and adds an end-to-end smoke test; no production Java added or modified. Coverage gate applies to producer code (KnowledgeAssembler, story-0051-0001) and the upcoming cleanup (story-0051-0006). The 1 new smoke class is a structural invariant over the generated .claude/ tree — not a subject of line/branch coverage.

delta.note: Net delta zero: +5 new KnowledgePackMigrationSmokeTest methods; -5 obsolete per-KP skill-golden assertions retired by the golden regeneration (RULE-051-08 single atomic sweep). Total stable at 4163/0/0/0.

acceptanceCriteriaCheckResults.evidence: KnowledgePackMigrationSmokeTest#knowledgePopulation_listsAtLeast30Packs walks .claude/knowledge/ and asserts count >= 30. Actual count matches kp-inventory.txt (~32 entries).

acceptanceCriteriaCheckResults.scenario: no forbidden frontmatter fields in knowledge/*
acceptanceCriteriaCheckResults.evidence: KnowledgePackMigrationSmokeTest#knowledgeFrontmatter_hasNoForbiddenFields parses frontmatter of every .claude/knowledge/*.md (and index.md) and asserts zero occurrences of user-invocable, allowed-tools, etc. per RULE-051-07.

acceptanceCriteriaCheckResults.scenario: sampled skill consumers do not reference old skills/{kp}/SKILL.md paths
acceptanceCriteriaCheckResults.evidence: KnowledgePackMigrationSmokeTest#sampledSkillConsumers_doNotReferenceOldPaths samples x-arch-plan, x-review-pr, x-story-plan under .claude/skills/ and asserts zero matches against the legacy path regex.

acceptanceCriteriaCheckResults.scenario: generated rules do not reference old skills/{kp}/SKILL.md paths
acceptanceCriteriaCheckResults.evidence: KnowledgePackMigrationSmokeTest#rules_doNotReferenceOldPaths walks .claude/rules/ and asserts every KP reference uses the knowledge/ prefix.

acceptanceCriteriaCheckResults.scenario: sampled KPs exist at new knowledge/ location
acceptanceCriteriaCheckResults.evidence: KnowledgePackMigrationSmokeTest#sampledKps_existAtNewLocation asserts architecture, coding-standards, testing, security, observability each resolve to either .claude/knowledge/{kp}.md or .claude/knowledge/{kp}/index.md.

goldenRegeneration.rule: RULE-051-08 (goldens regenerated in a single story)

diffSummary.modified: .claude/skills/core/**/SKILL.md (story-0051-0003 retrofit deltas), .claude/rules/0[3-9]-*.md (story-0051-0004 retrofit deltas), .claude/README.md (Knowledge Packs section)

checks: KnowledgePackMigrationSmokeTest aligns with SkillConsumerRetrofitInvariantTest (skills/core/) and RuleKpRetrofitInvariantTest (rules/) — layered defence, no contradictions.
Golden diff is a single atomic sweep — no intermediate partial state landed on develop.
Constants in the smoke test (KNOWLEDGE_DIR, SKILLS_DIR, FORBIDDEN_FRONTMATTER_FIELDS, SAMPLED_CONSUMERS, SAMPLED_KPS) extracted for reuse.
No new residual skills/{kp}/SKILL.md references anywhere in .claude/ tree.

legacyAudits.rule13SkillInvocation: PASS (grep command from 13-skill-invocation-protocol.md Audit Command section — 0 matches)

smokeResult.detail: KnowledgePackMigrationSmokeTest: 5/5 PASS. Full mvn test: BUILD SUCCESS at 4163/0/0/0.
